name: Number 22: Zombiestein
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>２２ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>不</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>乱</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ラン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>健</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ケン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
2 Level 8 DARK monsters
Must be Xyz Summoned. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card and send 1 card from your hand to the GY, then target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; change this card to Defense Position, and if you do, negate that targeted card's effects, until the end of this turn.

eff:
2 Level 8 DARK monsters

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
